common.tagline: Pro label checks and print tools

home.heroTitle: Unlock paid shipping-label checks before you buy postage.
home.heroDescription: Use Pro tools to check marketplace, carrier, paper and printer setup, then get clear 4×6, Letter or A4 guidance with scale, orientation and print-dialog settings.
home.trustNote: Guides stay free. Interactive checks and generated PDFs unlock with Pro Toolkit.
home.problemStatement: Solve shipping label size, print scale and printer-setting problems before you buy postage or reprint a carrier label.

pricing.metaDescription: Shipping Label Helper pricing for free guides and paid local PDF tools.
pricing.intro: Guides, SEO pages and reference material stay free. Every interactive checker, calculator, diagnostic and generated PDF belongs to Pro Toolkit.
pricing.honestyText: Paid access uses Creem license keys. Keep your key safe because this site does not store user accounts.
pricing.checkoutReadyNote: Secure checkout is ready. After payment, enter the Creem license key from your receipt or customer portal.

free.name: Free content
free.note: Good for sellers researching label sizes, printer setup and troubleshooting steps.
free.feature2: Browse SEO landing pages for common label problems
free.feature3: Open reference PDFs and template explanation pages
free.feature4: Decide which paid tool matches the print problem

pro.name: Pro Toolkit
pro.note: Unlock local tools for sellers checking size, scale, PDFs, barcode quiet zones and printer calibration before buying paid postage.
pro.feature1: Run the size checker and scale calculator
pro.feature2: Analyze PDF page size and estimated scale
pro.feature3: Generate calibration sheets and test print packs
pro.feature4: Review barcode quiet zones from an image

pricing.nextTitle: Ready to use the paid tools?
pricing.nextText: Read the free guides to understand the likely cause, then unlock Pro Toolkit for size checks, PDF diagnostics, barcode review and generated test PDFs.
